author: y4rr
content: Decision: ferrotorch-core::roll<T> takes (shifts: i64, dim: usize) — a single-axis API. The kernel matches that single-axis surface. Multi-axis 'shifts/dims' rolling is naturally expressed as repeated single-axis rolls; the unit test for the kernel will compose two single-axis rolls to verify a 2-D shift, but the public Rust signature is unchanged.
